concerns.text: Constitution II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent execution as a blocking gate for all citations (Slack 1979, Smith et al. 2021). No task exists to run this validation agent. This is a constitution-mandated requirement without coverage.

Constitution V (Versioning Discipline) requires content hashes for EVERY artifact recorded in state/projects/...yaml. T007 only covers SHA-256 for raw data files. No task generates/updates hashes for derived artifacts (cleaned data, descriptors, figures, reports).
T004 tags FR-007 (causal-language check) but the task is about environment configuration/API keys. FR-007 is implemented in T028. This is a stale/incorrect FR tag that should be removed.
T008 tags FR-011 (feature-importance report) but the task is about validation utilities and VIF tools. FR-011 is implemented in T031. This is a stale/incorrect FR tag that should be removed.

FR-015 requires R² > 0.5 justification in the 'final report'. T030 places it in research.md. Unclear if research.md satisfies 'final report' requirement. Either clarify task description or add task for final report generation.
